init.description: How often to poll the Polestar cloud for updates. Lower values give faster updates but may increase server load and 12v battery usage. Default is 300 seconds (5 minutes).

data.demo: Demo mode (fake vehicle, no API connection)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Polestar
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your password to reconnect.

error.vin_not_found: VIN not found on this Polestar account
